meta.title: Deploy Llama 2 for your Entire Organisation
meta.description:
An installation guide for Llama 2 or Code Llama for enterprise use-cases:
* Run Llama on a server you control
* Control the branding of the user interface

*Critical tools:*
- text-generation-inference: https://github.com/huggingface/text-generation-inference
- chat-ui: https://github.com/huggingface/chat-ui

*Get access to the private Github repo for:*
- Detailed install instructions for running on AWS
- Detailed instructions for deploying with RunPod (cheaper/easier GPU access).
- Detailed questions/support
- Function calling inference scripts
Learn more: https://trelis.com/enterprise-server-api-and-inference-guide/

0:00 Deploy an Enterprise Language Model on AWS (or on Google, Azure or Oracle).
0:59 How do I run Llama 2 on a server
1:43 What is the best GPU for running Llama 2
2:27 How to set up an AWS server for Llama 2
12:17 How to set up an api for llama with text-generation-inference
13:24 How to set up Nvidia drivers on an AWS server
15:25 What Llama model to choose?
17:20 Installing an app to run a Llama chatbot with chat-ui
20:05 How to select temperature and length for a language model
23:10 Adding password protection to your chat model (and more)
